summary: Iteration 6 (geocoding + distance-band matching) — 16/16 backend pytest cases pass; full frontend e2e flow for in-person Eagle 83616 intake → verify → admin dashboard distance display verified end-to-end. Haversine math, KNOWN_CITY_GEOS map, ZIP-via-Nominatim, city-via-known-map, therapist signup auto-geocoding, backfill of 100+ seeded office_geos, notified_distances on /api/admin/requests/{id}, distance bands 15/12/7/3/0(+6 telehealth fallback), and graceful substring fallback when geo missing all confirmed. Frontend ZIP input enforces numeric-only and maxLength=5; submitting persists location_zip to DB; admin detail dialog shows 'X.X mi away' (terracotta) + office cities for each notified therapist.
action_items: (Doc nit) Problem statement says 'Intake form step 3' but ZIP/city actually live on step 3 of 6 (index 2 in code) — UI matches the spec, only the iteration note's step numbering is ambiguous. No code change needed.

(Optional) ZIP input maxLength=5 is enforced at DOM level, so a paste of 'abc12def345xyz9' is browser-clamped to 'abc12' before the regex strips → final value '12'. The regex+maxLength belt-and-suspenders works for typed input but is mildly surprising on paste. Consider stripping non-digits before applying maxLength to make pastes more forgiving (e.g. take input.replace(/\D/g,'').slice(0,5) without relying on the maxLength attribute). Cosmetic only.
(Carryover) Hard-delete TEST_-prefixed therapists/requests created during regression runs to keep admin counts stable.
critical_code_review_comments: geocoding.py is clean and well-bounded: Nominatim serialized via asyncio.Lock + 1.05s sleep, DB cache via geocache collection, KNOWN_CITY_GEOS short-circuits seed cities. Good.
matching._score_location correctly distinguishes geo-data path vs substring-fallback path; telehealth gives 6pt fallback for >75mi which preserves coverage in rural Idaho. Solid.

server.create_request: ZIP preferred over city for patient_geo (matches spec). patient_geo always stored even for virtual sessions (harmless, keeps data for future analytics). _trigger_matching computes notified_distances only when patient_geo is present. Correct.

_backfill_therapist_geo runs as a fire-and-forget task on lifespan startup; idempotent via {office_geos:{$exists:false}} filter. For ~100 Idaho seed therapists this completes near-instantly thanks to KNOWN_CITY_GEOS. Good.

AdminDashboard.jsx renders distance_miles only when non-null with terracotta color (#C66B4D-ish). office_locations join is joined with a comma. Empty office_locations correctly hide the cities span. Good.

IntakeForm step 2 (label 'Step 3 of 6: Format & location') correctly shows ZIP only when format ∈ {in-person, hybrid} via the `(data.session_format === 'in-person' || data.session_format === 'hybrid')` guard. data-testid='zip-input' present.

Edge case OK: requests with patient_geo but a therapist with empty office_geos will fall through to substring; if both are missing the legacy city-substring path runs — verified by reading _score_location. No regression risk.
Minor: server.py is now ~900 lines — even more reason to extract /api/auth/* and /api/portal/* into a separate module as previously flagged in iter5. Still functional.
geocache collection is unbounded; for a long-running deployment consider TTL index. Not urgent for MVP.
Nominatim USER_AGENT is hard-coded; that's fine but moving to env in future is cleaner.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on tested flows (intake ZIP/city visibility + numeric/maxLength enforcement + submit→DB persistence + admin dashboard distance display)

test_credentials: Admin: admin123! | Test ZIP 83616=Eagle ID via Nominatim
seed_data_creation: Created 4-5 TEST_iter6_* requests during testing (Boise/Eagle/virtual). One TEST_iter6_t_<uuid8>@example.com pending therapist created via signup test (left in pending_approval queue). Geocache populated for 83616 + a few unique ZIPs.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public URL: https://care-matcher-1.preview.emergentagent.com. To re-run: `export REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://care-matcher-1.preview.emergentagent.com MONGO_URL=mongodb://localhost:27017 DB_NAME=test_database ADMIN_PASSWORD='admin123!' && pytest /app/backend/tests/test_iteration6_geo.py -v`. The fixture `created_inperson_eagle_request` does ONE Nominatim call for ZIP 83616 (~1.05s) — if you create more unique ZIPs, each adds ~1.05s due to asyncio.Lock+sleep. Use cities from KNOWN_CITY_GEOS (boise/meridian/eagle/etc) to avoid Nominatim. Verified Eagle 83616 in-person request notifies 12 therapists with distances 1.0–15.8mi (Boise=10.3, Meridian=6.0, Nampa=14.4, Eagle=1.0). Admin detail dialog shows distance via t.distance_miles && '<X> mi away' selector and t.office_locations cities. Intake ZIP input is on step index 2 (UI shows 'Step 3 of 6: Format & location'). Frontend submit-btn requires 3 consent checkboxes (terms, 18+, not emergency).
verified_features: haversine_miles Boise→Idaho Falls ≈ 209mi (great-circle; >75mi=0pt or 6pt telehealth fallback)
KNOWN_CITY_GEOS contains 15 Idaho cities including boise/meridian/eagle/nampa/idaho falls/twin falls/etc
POST /api/requests with location_city=Boise (no zip) → patient_geo source='city' from KNOWN_CITY_GEOS in <3.5s (no Nominatim call)
POST /api/requests with location_zip=83616 → patient_geo source='zip', lat≈43.7, lng≈-116.37 via Nominatim
POST /api/requests virtual + city → request created, session_format=virtual (matching ignores patient_geo for virtual)
Therapist signup with office_locations=[Boise, Meridian] → office_geos populated with both cities' coords
Backfill: ≥80% of seeded therapists have office_geos (verified via /api/admin/therapists?pending=false)
GET /api/admin/requests/{id}: notified[].distance_miles + notified[].office_locations populated; request.notified_distances dict populated
Distance bands working: in-person Eagle 83616 → 12 notified, distances 1.0mi (Eagle/Meridian) up to 15.8mi (Nampa); Boise=10.3mi, Meridian=6.0mi
REGRESSION: /api/, /api/admin/login (correct + wrong), /api/portal/me missing-token=401, /api/auth/request-code invalid-role=400, /api/admin/stats therapists≥100 — all OK
FRONTEND: Intake step 'Format & location' — selecting 'In-person' reveals both city-input and zip-input
FRONTEND: zip-input data-testid present; typing 'abc' leaves field empty (numeric-only); typing '1234567' clamps to '12345' (maxLength=5)
FRONTEND: Submitting intake with zip=83616 returns 200 with rid; admin API confirms location_zip='83616' and patient_geo source='zip' persisted

FRONTEND: /admin/dashboard request detail dialog shows '10.3 mi away', '6 mi away', '14.4 mi away' (terracotta color) under each notified therapist, plus office cities (Boise/Meridian/Rexburg, Meridian)
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — feature works end-to-end; no defects observed.
